short_summary: New PM nominee, Iran deal pending
rationale: Romania's government formation remains the dominant domestic story; Liberal former mayor nominated as PM is a fresh but continuing development awaiting confidence vote.

top_events.title: Romanian president picks Liberal former mayor as PM
top_events.summary: The nomination of a new PM candidate is a direct domestic political development for Romanians, affecting government stability and EU fund access.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: conflicting signals on Sunday signing
top_events.summary: A confirmed deal could lower energy prices across Europe including Romania, but uncertainty persists — indirect benefit if signed.

top_events.title: UK seizes suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: Tightening sanctions enforcement on Russia's shadow fleet is relevant to Black Sea security and Romania's interest in isolating Russian energy revenues.
